plugin.name: Hotkeys
plugin.author: Juan Carlos Acosta Peraba
plugin.description:
EN: Save ticket forms and ticket task forms using keyboard shortcuts. - Smart Save (Ctrl/Cmd + S): Saves the currently active or edited task form (in modal or timeline), otherwise saves the ticket form. - Force Save Ticket (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + S): Bypasses task forms to directly save the ticket.

ES: Guarda formularios de tickets y tareas de tickets usando atajos de teclado. - Guardado Inteligente (Ctrl/Cmd + S): Guarda el formulario de tarea activo o editado (en modal o timeline), de lo contrario guarda el ticket. - Forzar Guardado de Ticket (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + S): Ignora las tareas abiertas para guardar directamente el ticket.
